summary: ClashSolverAssessSpaceAroundDeviceSixDirectionsCommand — PDF "ASSESS_SPACE_AROUND_DEVICE". Device-anchored wrapper over the canonical six-direction assessment MCP tool.
usecase: Pre-flight check before any Move*IntoSpace decision.
precondition: Active document; one resolvable element (Bot via UniqueId, Human via single selection).
logictree:
1) Resolve element: Resolver_ElementUniqueId (Bot) else single active selection (Human).
2) WireError if unresolved.
3) Probe point = LocationPoint.Point if available, else BB centroid.
4) Delegate to SpaceAnalysisAssessAroundPointInSixDirections.GetAll.
5) Attach element identity to result.
6) Tracker output + TaskDialog on Human path.
keywords: clash solver assess space around device

preprompts: Assessing space around the selected device…
